@graph.description: Puerarin is the major isoflavone linked to kudzu-derived materials and has been studied in vascular, metabolic, and estrogen-related contexts. Human evidence exists, especially in Asia, but it is narrower and less replicated than the strongest compound-level.
@graph.name: puerarin
